title: After 2-3 years, I finally launched my CADBot!!!
author: Legitimate_Pay_865
selftext: Im just so happy and proud its funded and functional :D just wanted to share, maybe get some feedback or advice...

replies.author: Legitimate_Pay_865
replies.body: My trading bot. I just leave it running 24/7 and it trades stocks/options...

replies.author: Fluid-Arachnid-8909
replies.body: I'm so interested in creating a trading bot too, I really worked hard but idk what to use etc.

comments.author: Fluid-Arachnid-8909
comments.body: can you teach or explain how it works

comments.author: ddchbr
comments.body: Thanks for sharing. What service/broker do you work with and why did you choose them? Thanks

replies.author: Legitimate_Pay_865
replies.body: Alpaca. I started years ago and was new to coding. Alpaca was amazingly simple to get going and backtest/forward test everything i needed to.

replies.author: Maniacal-Maniac
replies.body: Good to hear, I have just finished planning a project that involves Alpaca as a data source, so good to hear its straight forward to use.

comments.author: Daniel-DK
comments.body: Congratulations. I think any bot needs to run for a year to proof it's working long term. I never heard of Alpaca. Need to check it out. Thanks for sharing.

replies.author: Legitimate_Pay_865
replies.body: A year to prove by your standards I suppose. Ive been trading through the worst of the last 10 years and always came out positive...So to me, this is just a formality. A true visualization of my vision and experience.

replies.author: RoverMars2022
replies.body: Amazing. I have been losing money way too much, I am relying on wrong heads. You are the man I should talk to. I appreciate any help. Is this available for outsiders like me?

replies.author: Legitimate_Pay_865
replies.body: I only do this because of the 90/90/90 rule. I have seemingly found an algorithm that maximizes capital deployment efficiency while keeping up to the benchmark on raw pl. its not re-inventing the wheel, its adding rubber to my round wheels while everyone else is using stone and square wheels like the flintstones...Saw too many people lose, so I made this "If you cant lose, you can only win"

replies.author: RoverMars2022
replies.body: The way I felt from your post is your genuineness, being firm and integrity. If there is a possibility to work with your bot and available to others such as me that would be great. I have to achieve cash flows without losing my hard earned capital. I trusted way too many wrong heads, trying to find one good head 🙂‍↕️. LOL, Please let me know. Thank you.

replies.author: Legitimate_Pay_865
replies.body: This isnt about money. Im just a lazy mathematician that enjoys solving problems other struggle to, now that the stock market is solved, I can let it run daily while I work on other major problems this world has...My knowledge will be public one day. It wont be a pleasant transition for this species...

replies.author: RoverMars2022
replies.body: Thank you. It's hard to find good mathematicians any more. Glad to meet you, I was a math and engineering major. I built a quick trading system but still not able to make it useful. Btw, money has a great use provided the money is with the right person. My only goal in life is to run virtual education to orphan kids across the world to make the world a little better place.

replies.author: Legitimate_Pay_865
replies.body: Agreed. Noble intention. Lets hope we can help the world be better :)

comments.author: megacapslock
comments.body: How could you have been building an AI bot for 2-3 years if it’s only recently that AI has started to work reliably at all?

replies.author: Legitimate_Pay_865
replies.body: Started with chatgpt1.5 i think...and ya, they have been pretty bad until recently.

replies.author: megacapslock
replies.body: Nope, I’m just curious about your project. Nothing personal

replies.author: tumble00weed
replies.body:
Lol. Hear me out. 

I've been following your comments around various posts. I think what you've done, if, as you say, you are telling the truth about your backtesting result, is incredible. 2-3 years whats your paper trading win rate? And ROI (percentage)?

If you're claiming you've built a bot that will CONSISTENTLY outperform the market...even at ANY profit, you're sitting on a gold mine.

My actual comment to you:
I'm wondering if you're receiving all of this bs (everyone hating on you and trying to make you look stupid) because you have a bot that actually works and that just can't be...

replies.author: Legitimate_Pay_865
replies.body:
Not at ANY profit. The higher you set the take profit, the more it behaves like buy/hold except capital deployment efficiency remains respectably better.

Ive always been sitting on a gold mine in every field Ive worked (farming real crops, construction, trading, contracting, etc) Its simply in this instance, im in the Yukon with every other gold chaser testing my skills/ability to see how I compare against the average...If i am lacklustre, I work on it or dont waste my time pursuing...If I see promise, I continue R&D...All im doing is using the scientific method on any field that I find interesting or am adept at....this is a curiosity, not a necessity...

comments.author: BirthdayShot3743
comments.body: I believe your real and legit! Also would love to implement your bot lol if you feel like sharing it would be appreciated. In the future when my pennies became dollars I'd gladly kick you back some profits lol

comments.author: salma-quant17
comments.body: Tell me how much is the drawndown

comments.author: salma-quant17
comments.body: Can you give me the trade history?

comments.author: SubstantialTea5636
comments.body: That’s pretty cool. Congrats. Was the coding part intensive?
